# Very Hot Cocoa

## Description

Very Hot Cocoa is an Ancient Relic offered by Tezcatara at the start of Act 2.

- Start each combat with an additional 4 Energy.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong in decks with high-impact turn-one cards or draw, such as Demon Form, Battle Trance, Fiend Fire, and AoE attacks.
